title: i Wanna Travel
body:
# I Wanna Travel (IWT)
## [Forge|Fabric|NeoForge|DataPack]

 

Are you ready for an adventure like no other? With the "i Wanna Travel" mod, embark on a journey through a world filled with unique and stunning structures that seamlessly blend into their surroundings. With over 30 different structures to discover, each one is meticulously designed to enhance your exploration experience.

From ancient ruins hidden deep within dense forests to majestic temples perched high atop snow-capped mountains, every structure tells a story waiting to be uncovered. Whether you're a seasoned explorer or a novice traveler, there's always something new to discover with "i Wanna Travel."

 

Features:
- Over 30 unique structures to explore, each with its own distinct design and atmosphere.
- Seamlessly integrated into the game world.
- Regular updates and additions, guaranteeing endless hours of exploration and discovery.

So why wait? start your journey to uncover the secrets of the world around you!

**The mod is not required on the client side**

_you can use it in a modpack_
